text.title: Feature Flag Rollout and Targeting Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this flag a gradual/targeted rollout AND is there a stable user id?

conclusion.verdict: disable or use device id; never anonymous-True

text.example: Flag new-checkout-flow, targeting country in [US,CA] → ramp 1→5→25→50→100 over 5 days → bucket on user_id (sha256) → no guardrail breach → lock 100 → schedule cleanup ticket.
